subject: [PATCH] vswap: fix poor batching behavior of vswap free path

reviews.author: Kairui Song
reviews.summary: Requested that the author apply the patch on top of the vswap series and run it on their test suite to gather more data.

2026-02-25.patch_summary: This patch addresses two issues in the vswap free path, improving its efficiency by batching consecutive free operations and avoiding unnecessary lock releases. The patch also optimizes the PTE zapping step to take advantage of the virtual swap infrastructure's ability to handle mixed backend ranges.
